name: pr-cycle
description: /pr-cycle — one-shot PR cycle command. Pushes the current branch (`git push -u origin HEAD`) then `gh pr create --fill`; the `pr-cycle-hook` plugin's PreToolUse hook then auto-appends ` && gh pr merge --squash --admin --delete-branch` (+ worktree/branch cleanup when run from a linked worktree) — so one command does create → merge → clean. Refuses on main/master. Pass extra gh flags as args (e.g. --title "..." --body "..."). Command half of the pr-cycle split (the routing PreToolUse hook is the `pr-cycle-hook` plugin).
